task_updates.executor_notes: Refactored create-task insertion into a reusable loop that supports batch responses, reuses the existing 23505 idempotency recovery path per insert, and derives per-task batch idempotency keys as deterministic SHA-256 hashes of `clientIdempotencyKey:taskIndex`. Verification: `npx tsc --noEmit` passed; direct edge-file `vitest` execution was blocked by remote-import loader limits in this workspace.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Batch idempotency derivation now uses `sha256(clientIdempotencyKey + ':' + taskIndex)` inside `resolveInsertIdempotencyKey()`, so retries of the same request reproduce the same per-task keys instead of generating fresh UUIDs.
